title: Structural Analysis of Oxide Glasses
description: Complete structural analysis workflow for oxide glasses using amorphouspy: radial distribution functions, coordination numbers, Qn species, bond angle distributions, structure factor S(q), Guttman ring statistics, and cavity analysis.
steps/codes: Compute partial radial distribution functions g(r)
Compute Qn species distribution and network connectivity
Compute neutron and X-ray structure factor S(q)
Compute cavity volumes, surface areas, and shape statistics
Run full analysis workflow with analyze_structure
